vocab.word: have a whale of a time
vocab.meaning: có một khoảng thời gian cực kỳ vui vẻ
vocab.example: I remember having a whale of a time playing hide-and-seek with my cousins every summer.

vocab.meaning: mê mẩn trong thế giới riêng của mình
vocab.example: Whenever I had my sketchbook out, I was completely lost in my own world, oblivious to everything else.

vocab.meaning: cố gắng hết sức mình (để làm gì đó)
vocab.example: I would bend over backwards to finish my chores quickly just so I could go out and play football.

vocab.meaning: tràn đầy năng lượng, hăng hái
vocab.example: As a kid, I was always full of beans, constantly running around the garden until the sun went down.

vocab.meaning: cực kỳ hạnh phúc, sung sướng tột độ
vocab.example: I was on cloud nine whenever my father took me fishing at the local pond on weekends.

vocab.meaning: thử làm một việc gì đó lần đầu tiên
vocab.example: I was always eager to give any new sport a whirl, whether it was badminton or rollerblading.

vocab.meaning: kiên trì vượt qua mọi khó khăn/luôn đồng hành cùng nhau
vocab.example: My childhood best friend and I stayed together through thick and thin, mostly getting into mischief.

vocab.word: in the blink of an eye
vocab.meaning: trong nháy mắt (diễn tả thời gian trôi nhanh)
vocab.example: Summer holidays always seemed to pass in the blink of an eye because we were having so much fun.

vocab.meaning: tìm thấy niềm vui/sự thú vị từ việc gì
vocab.example: I used to get a real kick out of building elaborate sandcastles at the beach.

vocab.meaning: điều gì đó khiến ai đó rất vui mừng khi nghe thấy
vocab.example: The sound of the ice cream truck was absolute music to my ears during the sweltering afternoons.
